untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-timeframe confluence detection (daily, weekly, monthly floor pivots simultaneously), swing pivot identification, range highs/lows, and candle pattern confirmation. The available indicator set lacks: (1) multi-timeframe pivot comparison logic, (2) swing pivot detection across timeframes, (3) range extrema tracking, (4) candle pattern recognition operators. These require complex hierarchical logic not expressible with simple 3-field conditions and allowed operators.
translation_notes: This is a sophisticated multi-timeframe confluence strategy that cannot be accurately reduced to single-timeframe indicator conditions. The core logic requires: identifying significant price levels via confluence of multiple sources across multiple timeframes, then waiting for candle pattern confirmation at those levels. The available operators (>, <, >=, <=, ==, crosses_above, crosses_below, is) and single-bar indicator set are insufficient to express cross-timeframe pivot confluence detection and hierarchical location-first-then-pattern validation.
